Q2 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A light beam is incident from air to a medium with a dielectric constant 4 and relative permeability 100. If the angle of incidence is 60°, the angle of transmission is ______ degrees
(correct to two decimal places)
 

NAT
Correct answer: 2.48 (2.30 - 2.60)
Solution

2.48 (2.30 - 2.60)

A uniform plane wave with propagates in a lossless medium (∈r = 4, μr = 1, σ = 0) in the +z direction. Assume that is sinusoidal with a frequency 100 MHz and has a maximum value of 10–4 (V/m) at t = 0 and The instantaneous expression for H is

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)

Q4 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

A sinusoidal electric intensity of amplitude 250 (V/m) and frequency 1 GHz exists in a lossy dielectric medium that has a relative permittivity of 2.5 and a loss tangent of 0.001. The average power dissipated in the medium per cubic meter is

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)

Solution

0.03 (0.02 - 0.04)
